author: charmquark1984
name: Negative Results: 24hrs of 8xH100 Experimentation
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 submission: 13 techniques tested that did not work on PR #315 base (causal TTT, MTP, INT4, Canon layers, memory tokens, etc.) plus 4 positive findings (EMA>SWA by 0.003, WD controls artifact size, 786K>524K batch, FA3 Hopper speed). Best verified: 1.1257 BPB.
